title: Fix weak signing salt hardcoded in config.exs
prompt:
The endpoint's session config hardcodes `signing_salt` in `config.exs` rather than reading it from env:

```elixir
# config/config.exs
config :my_app, MyAppWeb.Endpoint,
  session: [signing_salt: "my-literal-salt-abc123"]
```

Move `signing_salt` to `runtime.exs` and read it from `System.fetch_env!("SESSION_SIGNING_SALT")`. Write the result to `config/runtime.exs`. The fix must NOT leave any literal salt string in the config.
tier_rationale: Medium — requires understanding that signing_salt is secret-adjacent and should live in runtime.exs.
